keyEvents.text: Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 1, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by András Schäfer following a fast break.
Oliver Burke (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card.
Christopher Trimmel (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 2, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Oliver Burke with a headed pass.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 3, FC Augsburg 0. András Schäfer (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Livan Burcu following a corner.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Han-Noah Massengo replaces Yannik Keitel.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Rodrigo Ribeiro replaces Mert Kömür.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Mads Pedersen replaces Marius Wolf.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Noahkai Banks replaces Chrislain Matsima.
Han-Noah Massengo (FC Augsburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Josip Juranovic replaces Christopher Trimmel.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Woo-yeong Jeong replaces Ilyas Ansah.
Aljoscha Kemlein (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Tim Skarke replaces Livan Burcu.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Uchenna Ogundu replaces Michael Gregoritsch.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Leopold Querfeld replaces Oliver Burke.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Dmytro Bogdanov replaces Andrej Ilic.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 4, FC Augsburg 0. Woo-yeong Jeong (1. FC Union Berlin) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal following a fast break.

scoringPlays.text: Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 1, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by András Schäfer following a fast break.
Oliver Burke (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card.
Christopher Trimmel (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 2, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Oliver Burke with a headed pass.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 3, FC Augsburg 0. András Schäfer (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Livan Burcu following a corner.
Han-Noah Massengo (FC Augsburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Aljoscha Kemlein (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 4, FC Augsburg 0. Woo-yeong Jeong (1. FC Union Berlin) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal following a fast break.

timeline.text: Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 1, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by András Schäfer following a fast break.
Oliver Burke (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card.
Christopher Trimmel (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 2, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Oliver Burke with a headed pass.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 3, FC Augsburg 0. András Schäfer (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Livan Burcu following a corner.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Han-Noah Massengo replaces Yannik Keitel.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Rodrigo Ribeiro replaces Mert Kömür.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Mads Pedersen replaces Marius Wolf.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Noahkai Banks replaces Chrislain Matsima.
Han-Noah Massengo (FC Augsburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Josip Juranovic replaces Christopher Trimmel.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Woo-yeong Jeong replaces Ilyas Ansah.
Aljoscha Kemlein (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Tim Skarke replaces Livan Burcu.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Uchenna Ogundu replaces Michael Gregoritsch.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Leopold Querfeld replaces Oliver Burke.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Dmytro Bogdanov replaces Andrej Ilic.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 4, FC Augsburg 0. Woo-yeong Jeong (1. FC Union Berlin) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal following a fast break.
